items.title: Fast Food Bets Big on Beverages to Get Customers Through the Door
items.description: Fast-food chains like McDonald’s, Wendy’s and Taco Bell are focusing on trendy beverages to boost sales and customer visits.

items.title: McDonald's (MCD) Launches McDonaldland VR: Explore Iconic Worlds Through Interactive Experiences
items.description: McDonald's (MCD) recently introduced McDonaldland VR, an innovative interactive universe, marking a significant step in digital engagement. This launch aligns with a broader trend of increased digital interaction among consumers. In the previous month, McDonald's stock reflected a 1.48% increase, a movement that was relatively aligned with the broader market's upward trend following promising inflation data and expectations of potential Federal Reserve interest rate cuts. items.title: Starbucks And McDonald's: Fast Food Giant Better Positioned Amid China Challenges
items.description: Starbucks faces significant hurdles in China. Read why these challenges mirror past struggles for McDonald's.

items.title: Snapchat Launches ‘McDonaldland’ AR Experience
items.description: Snapchat will play a part in McDonald’s latest multi-platform promotion.

items.title: Women in Restaurant Leadership Announces McDonald's Executive Tabassum Zalotrawala as Opening Keynote for 2026 Together Summit
items.description: QSR and FSR's Women in Restaurant Leadership (WiRL), a division of WTWH Media, is proud to announce Tabassum Zalotrawala, Senior Vice President of Global Restaurant Design and U.S. Chief Development Officer at McDonald's, will deliver the opening keynote at the WiRL Together Summit, taking place February 25–26, 2026, at the Charleston Marriott.
